site.title: Teja Kumar G S | AI Engineer

hero.eyebrow: AI Engineer  ·  Computer Vision  ·  GenAI  ·  Real-Time Systems
hero.description: I build computer vision systems that don't just detect things — they decide things. My focus is turning raw model output into signals a factory floor can actually trust, using spatial logic and temporal tracking, and owning the pipeline end to end, from raw data to live deployment.

about.heading:
Building AI systems that
work in the real world.
paragraphs: A high mAP score is where the real work starts, not where it ends. Once a model hits a factory floor, it has to reason about position, sequence, and time — not just 'is the object there.' A detection that's right 98% of the time can still be useless in production if the other 2% sets off a false alarm every ten minutes.

That's the gap I work in. I layer centroid-based spatial checks, temporal smoothing, and rule-based state machines on top of detection models, so the output is something an operations team can actually act on — not just a bounding box.
I own the whole pipeline: labeling the data, training the model, shipping it, watching how it behaves in production, and writing down exactly where it still breaks, so nobody gets surprised later.

constraintsBox.title: System Constraints I Work Under
items: Real-world noise: motion blur, hand occlusion, lighting shifts

jobs.title: AI Engineer Intern
bullets: Trained YOLO on 17K+ images (90K+ CVAT annotations) — achieved mAP50 of 0.92 with stable inference at 13+ FPS in live production.

Layered centroid-based spatial validation to confirm tool presence within predefined work zones; introduced temporal smoothing and state-machine tracking to suppress false positives from motion blur and operator hand overlap.
Integrated hardware alert system (tower lamp + buzzer) for real-time enforcement — reduced manual inspection effort by ~40%.
Built and deployed Docker-ready Flask REST API with live monitoring dashboard. Full pipeline: CVAT annotation → training → deployment → production monitoring.

jobs.title: DL Engineer Intern
bullets: Built RAG pipelines using LangChain + ChromaDB with locally hosted LLMs via Ollama (Mistral, LLaMA) — zero cloud dependency, fully air-gapped.
Developed multimodal document understanding pipelines — PaddleOCR + Tesseract + HuggingFace Transformers for text, tables, and named entity extraction.
Deployed all models on-premises for secure, low-latency inference. Exposed capabilities via FastAPI endpoints for stakeholder demos.

projects.title: Production-Line Defect Scanner
projects.description: A fixed-camera vision system that checks drill-tightening compliance on the assembly line. Frame-by-frame detection alone wasn't reliable enough, so I built a logic layer on top — centroid ROI checks, a state machine, and temporal smoothing — that turns noisy detections into a compliance signal the floor can actually trust.

designDecisions.title: Design Decisions
bullets: Fixed geometry eliminated need for homography
Centroid over IoU — handles tool shape variance
Known failure: extreme occlusion during fast motion

projects.title: GreenyAI — RAG Chat Assistant
projects.description: A chat assistant that actually reads what you hand it — drop in a PDF and it answers questions grounded in that document, powered by Groq-hosted Llama models with instant model switching. Conversations persist across sessions via Supabase, with one-click chat export built in.

projects.title: Offline RAG Document Intelligence
projects.description: An offline Q&A and summarization pipeline — Mistral and LLaMA running locally through Ollama, with PaddleOCR, Tesseract, and HuggingFace handling multimodal extraction. No cloud calls, built for air-gapped enterprise environments.

projects.title: QC Workflow Automation
projects.description: Replaced a fully manual QC process with batch PDF processing — pulls 35+ structured fields across 50+ PDFs per run and outputs a formatted Excel report. Cut review time by roughly 90%.

projects.title: Automated Job Search System
projects.description: Scrapes job postings across multiple platforms, ranks them by keyword relevance, dedupes across sources, and tracks everything on one dashboard — a fully automated path from search to shortlist.

skills.title: Real-Time Detection
skills.description: YOLO-based detection, centroid spatial validation, ROI extraction, temporal state machines for industrial CV.

skills.title: Model Training & Curation
skills.description: Custom datasets (17K+ images), CVAT labeling, augmentation pipelines, mAP evaluation against production metrics.

skills.title: Offline RAG Pipelines
skills.description: LangChain + ChromaDB vector retrieval. Local LLM inference via Ollama — Mistral, LLaMA. Also shipped a Groq-hosted RAG chat app with Supabase-backed history — air-gapped or cloud, depending on what the job needs.

skills.title: Model Extraction
skills.description: PaddleOCR, Tesseract, PyMuPDF for text, tables, NER, and structured field extraction from diverse document formats.

skills.title: Production Systems
skills.description: Docker, Flask, FastAPI. Real-time inference pipelines. On-premises, air-gapped deployments with zero cloud dependency.

skills.title: Python & Version Control
skills.description: Python across all ML/AI pipelines. Git + GitHub for team workflows, branching strategies, PRs, and merge resolution.

steps.title: Define & Scope
steps.description: Map the process, identify the detection target, camera constraints, and what a reliable signal looks like.

steps.title: Curate Data
steps.description: Label with CVAT. Build datasets that cover failure modes — not just the clean cases. Augment for production variance.

steps.title: Train & Validate
steps.description: Train YOLO models. Evaluate against real production metrics. Iterate until the model handles noise.

steps.title: Build Logic Layer
steps.description: Centroid tracking, ROI filters, temporal smoothing, state machines. Turn detections into decisions.

steps.title: Deploy & Document
steps.description: Flask API, Docker, monitoring dashboard. Offline. Known-failure cases documented. No retraining post-deployment.

messages.label: Problem Definition
messages.bubble: Understand what needs to be detected and what makes a valid vs. invalid state in production.

messages.label: Data Curation
messages.bubble: 17K+ images, 90K+ annotations — covering edge cases and real failure modes.

messages.label: Spatial + Temporal Logic
messages.bubble: Centroid ROI + state machine on top of YOLO. Detections become decisions.

messages.label: Deploy & Monitor
messages.bubble: Flask API · Docker · Air-gapped · Continuous monitoring · Known failures logged.

availability.text:
Looking for roles in applied computer vision, industrial AI, or real-time ML systems — somewhere I can own a pipeline end to end, not just hand off a model and move on.

Based in Chennai. Open to on-site, hybrid, or remote.
